query:
SELECT cp.sellerId, s.name, cp.points, cp.salesCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = cp.sellerId AND competitionId = 1 AND status = 'approved') as realSales
FROM competition_participants cp 
JOIN sellers s ON s.id = cp.sellerId
WHERE cp.competitionId = 1
ORDER BY cp.points DESC;
